title: Agent Passport
description: A small JSON document describing one agent's identity. See SPEC.md §4.

owner.description: Human or team principal (email or group). See SPEC.md §4.1.

runtime.description: Free-form label for the agent runtime/framework (e.g. langgraph).

parent.description: Static provisioning parent agent ID. See SPEC.md §4.2.

attestation.description: How the org binds this name to a workload. See SPEC.md §4.3.

detail.description: Method-specific reference, e.g. a SPIFFE ID or issuer URL.

filesystem.description: Folders this agent is declared to access, each with a read or write mode. A declaration, not an enforced control. See SPEC.md §4.4.

path.description: Folder path the agent is declared to access.

models.description: LLM providers, models, and endpoints this agent is declared to use. A declaration for audit and inventory, not an enforced control. See SPEC.md §4.5.

provider.description: LLM provider label, e.g. anthropic, openai, bedrock, google, mistral, cohere.

model.description: Specific model this agent uses, when pinned, e.g. claude-sonnet-4-5 or gpt-4o.

endpoint.description: API endpoint host this agent is declared to reach, e.g. api.anthropic.com.

labels.description: Free-form key/value labels (e.g. env, cost_center). The "version" key is reserved by convention for the agent's own release version, not the passport schema version. See SPEC.md §4.6.
